ownerTitle: Owner, Ad Value Home Improvement · Kauai
bio: I started Ad Value Home Improvement because I believe homeowners deserve someone they can trust — someone who shows up, communicates clearly, and takes pride in every project.
Whether it's repairing a deck, remodeling a kitchen, building a custom fence, or transforming an outdoor space, my goal is simple: leave every home better than I found it.
As a husband and father raising our family here on Kauai, I'm proud to serve this community with honesty, craftsmanship, and aloha.
signature: We Ad Value! Mahalo for trusting us with your home.

values.title: Honest Communication
values.desc: No surprises, no runaround. I answer my own phone and give you straight answers from start to finish.

values.title: Skilled Craftsmanship
values.desc: Building in Hawaii's climate requires real expertise. Every material choice and technique is selected for longevity.

values.title: We Show Up
values.desc: When we commit to a date, we're there. Respecting your time is a core part of how we operate.

values.title: Aloha Values
values.desc: As a Kauai family, we treat your home like our own. This community deserves contractors who care.

values.title: Local & Accountable
values.desc: We live here. We're not a mainland company that'll disappear. Our reputation is everything.
